PostToolUse.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /opt/sleep-scoring-web/frontend && npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
PostToolUse.description: Auto-lint .ts/.tsx files with ESLint on edit

PostToolUse.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.py) ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
PostToolUse.description: Auto-format .py files with ruff on edit

PreToolUse.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files directly. Use .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 1;; esac
